doc: Shared UI strings (i18n). All platforms read the same catalog so wording never drifts. {placeholders} are substituted by each platform. Sample extracted from the Windows build; add more keys as the macOS/Linux UI is built.

strings.settings.title: translate-the-damn · 设置
strings.settings.field.listen: 启用剪贴板监听(复制即翻译)
strings.settings.field.keephover: 鼠标悬停时保持不消失
strings.error.auth: 认证失败,请在设置中登录或填写密钥。
strings.error.notfound: 找不到命令 “{command}”,请确认已安装并在 PATH 中。
strings.error.badoutput: 没有返回译文(可能是该 CLI 在 Windows 下的已知输出问题)。
strings.error.apikeyMissing: 请在设置中填写该后端的 API Key。
